scenarios.title: Run the agentic market-intelligence slice
scenarios.summary: The market-intelligence slice is strong, governed, and now distributed through a leadership-ready path with refresh and claim boundaries intact.

truthfulness_summary: The market-intelligence slice remains strong and mostly grounded in persisted evidence, but the overall control surface is still in watch mode.

dimension_scores.rationale: The slice compresses meaningful market research into decision-useful recommendations and now packages that output for leadership consumption without extra PM reconstruction.
The research pack now supports a leadership-ready digest and portfolio-facing summary without dropping evidence or claim boundaries.
The Ralph loop, validation lanes, unattended-refresh proof, and leadership-distribution report keep the slice disciplined even as its audience expands.
The slice keeps unattended-refresh thresholds, contradiction handling, escalation conditions, and leadership-review boundaries explicit before any broader claim is made.
Recurring refresh and leadership-ready distribution now both pass governed proof without changing the underlying research contract.

reviewer_verdict.summary: The market-intelligence slice remains one of the strongest evidence-backed paths in the repo.

tester_verdict.summary: The slice validates cleanly and remains a strong internal-use standard while the stable release claim stays bounded.

manual_verdict.summary: Keep using market intelligence internally while broader release claims stay gated by the remaining truthfulness work.

feedback_items.summary: Do not let the strongest research slice create a false sense that the broader runtime is already fully promotable.
feedback_items.recommended_action: Keep market intelligence internal-use while the truthful control-surface and eval hardening slice completes.

next_action: Keep the market-intelligence slice active, but do not use it to mask the weaker truthfulness state of the control surface.
